column1: NOTE: This export covers all deduplicated warrant register records ingested into the investigation database as of March 2026.
The canonical cumulative staffing vendor figure of $32,189,236 published in the articles includes five primary vendors (Amergis, Maxim, Soliant, ProCare, Pioneer).
Aveanna Healthcare and Stepping Stones Group payments are present in this register but excluded from the canonical staffing vendor total.
See vendor_summary_by_year.csv for the full reconciliation.
